text: $AAPL crushing earnings expectations yet again! Revenue up 12% YoY and guidance looks fantastic. This stock is going to the moon!
$TSLA shares plummeted 8% after production numbers came in well below estimates. The company faces significant headwinds in Q4.
$MSFT trading sideways today. No major news catalysts. Volume is below average.
The Fed just announced another rate hike. Markets are bracing for impact. $SPY looking weak heading into close.
$AMZN AWS revenue beat expectations by a wide margin. Cloud division continues to be the growth engine. Very bullish long-term.
Unemployment claims rose more than expected this week. The labor market is starting to show cracks. Recession fears growing.
$GOOG announced a massive stock buyback program worth $70 billion. Management clearly believes shares are undervalued.
$META is facing regulatory challenges in the EU. New fines could cost billions. Not a great setup for the next quarter.
Oil prices steady around $75/barrel. $XOM maintaining dividend and showing stable cash flow. Decent hold for income investors.
$NVDA is absolutely on fire! AI demand driving chip sales through the roof. Best positioned company in the entire semiconductor space.
